title.en: Many disciples of the Void Heaven Pulse were sh...

content.en:
"What's going on, how come there is another True Ancestor who has impacted the Dao Ancestor realm today?"

Many disciples of the Void Heaven Pulse were shocked.

It stands to reason that it is almost impossible for two True Ancestors to impact the Dao Ancestor realm at the same time, after all, the True Ancestors all know each other, and such a big thing must be picked a good day, and the state must be adjusted.

And at the same time, if the person in front of him fails to attack, it will definitely have an impact on the true ancestor later.

Therefore, there had never been a situation where two True Ancestors had attacked Dao Ancestors at the same time.

Soon, people also recognized this True Ancestor, and it was also an incomparably ancient True Ancestor, the Owl True Ancestor.

Rumble!!!!

The endless golden light bloomed, and the Owl Bone True Ancestor also successfully broke through to the realm of Dao Ancestor.

Two Dao Ancestors!

In one day, two Dao Ancestors were added to the Void Heaven One Vein, what a glorious event!

But soon, everyone was confused.

One True Ancestor after another hit the Dao Ancestor realm one after another, and from time to time there were visions of successful impacts.

With the passage of time, more and more new Dao Ancestors were born in the Void Heaven lineage.

Three!

Five!

Eight!

Ten places!

Twenty!

......

"What's going on?"

A true ancestor in the late stage of the Great Dao in the Void Heaven asked the Dao Ancestors who had just been promoted.

He thought this was too weird, was Dao Ancestor so easy to achieve?

Although there are some people who fail to impact, most of them succeed!

If the True Ancestors of the Void Heaven Pulse were all so powerful, there would not be only a few Dao Ancestors for a long time.

"This is the secret of the Void Heaven One Vein, and it can't be leaked for the time being!"

Xuheng Dao Ancestor opened his mouth to speak.

Seeing this, the others in the Void Heaven Pulse did not dare to probe.

Three years passed quickly.

Due to the complete blockade of the Void Heaven Realm, and the eyes of the major forces were focused on the various ruins of the Quasi-Dao Realm, no one paid attention to the situation in the Void Heaven Realm.

This led to the fact that the news of the birth of a large number of Dao Ancestors in the Void Heaven One Pulse was not exposed at all, allowing the Void Heaven One Pulse to develop steadily for a wave.

At the end of three years, all the hundreds of True Ancestors came to an end.

This time, 73 True Ancestors were born in the Void Heaven One Vein, and the impact of about thirty True Ancestors failed.

For those True Ancestors who failed to attack, their hopes of becoming Dao Ancestors were much lowered, and it was difficult to use the Merge Dao Treasure to impact the Dao Ancestor realm.

But now that the relics of the domain realm continue to appear, there is still hope to impact the Dao Ancestor realm.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor talked about the situation of the Domain Boundary Ruins, and these Dao Ancestors who failed to impact put their hopes on the Domain Boundary Ruins, hoping to find a way to break through to become a Dao Ancestor through the Domain Boundary Ruins.

"Next, we can summon back those top True Ancestors who are in the chaos!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor muttered.

---------------

Far away in the realm of chaos, somewhere in the ruins.

Dongxu True Ancestor, who was cultivating inside the ruins, opened his eyes, "Master actually summoned me back to the Void Heaven Realm?"

Dongxu True Ancestor is the seventeenth personal disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, and he is also a relatively old True Ancestor, his combat effectiveness is not weak, and he once fought with a Heavy Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

It's a pity that he has never found the opportunity to break through to become a Dao Ancestor, and he has competed for the place of the Ancestral Monument several times, but he has also failed.

Therefore, for a long time, he wandered alone in the chaos, and he had not returned to the Void Heaven Realm for a long time, and the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor had not contacted him.

But now, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor has sent a message.

"It's time to go back!"

Dongxu True Ancestor muttered.

In the next moment, there was no one in the ruins.

He was not the only True Ancestor in a situation similar to Dongxu True Ancestor, and one True Ancestor after another returned to the Void Heaven Realm.

Even the True Ancestors who were seated in the temporary residence of the Void Heaven First Pulse outside the Quasi-Dao Realm returned to the Void Heaven Realm, and those True Ancestors who failed to attack the Dao Ancestors took their place.

Such a move naturally attracted the attention of other forces, and they sent personnel to investigate the situation in the Void Heaven Realm.

Soon, they got the news.

"Impossible, how can the Void Heaven One Pulse give birth to 73 Dao Ancestors in just three years!!!"

The Dark God Dao Ancestor of the Dark God Temple roared angrily.

The Dark Temple is also a top power, with more than ten Dao Ancestors on the surface, but in fact there are close to thirty.

A force like the Void Heaven One Vein, the Dark God Temple didn't pay attention to it at all.

But now, there are 73 more Dao Ancestors in the Void Heaven One Vein, and the entire force has almost 80 Dao Ancestors.

It can be said that in addition to the four transcendent forces, the other forces do not have as many Dao Ancestors as the Void Heaven at all.

In an instant, all the top forces were jealous, and the forces that had some grudges against the Void Sky were even more panicked.

Even the four transcendent forces were a little unable to sit still, if they continued to develop at such a speed as the Void Heaven One Vein, wouldn't they want to become the fifth transcendent force, or even surpass them?

"Check, we must find out, why can the Void Heaven One Vein give birth to so many Dao Ancestors?"

The Dao Ancestors of the top major forces gave this order.

But with the passage of time, the number of Dao Ancestors in the Void Heaven Pulse is still increasing.

Ten years have passed, and the number of Dao Ancestors in the Void Heaven One Vein has exceeded a hundred, reaching as many as one hundred and ten.

Although they are basically one-tier Heavenly Dao Ancestors, it is very difficult for Dao Ancestors to kill each other, and a few one-tier Heavenly Dao Ancestors are enough to drag a two-fold Heavenly Dao Ancestor for a short time.

this day.

The Dark Temple, the Blood Moon Sect, the Soul Devouring Sect, the Demon Sound Sect, and the Three-Eyed Tail Horn Clan, the five major forces sent five Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors and thirty Dual Heavenly Dao Ancestors to ambush the Void Heaven Dao Ancestors.

They couldn't sit back and watch the Void Heaven One Pulse grow stronger, so as long as they killed the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, there would be no strong people in the Void Heaven One Pulse.

They even dared to enter the Void Heaven Pulse and discover the great secrets of the Void Heaven Thread, and maybe they could also make their respective forces grow many times over.

They originally thought that the raid could kill the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, but they didn't expect that the strength of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was infinitely close to the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

The battle was fierce and lasted for three months.

During this period, many Dao Ancestors of the Void Heaven One Pulse participated in the battle, and in the end, three One Heaven Dao Ancestors were killed in the Void Heaven One Pulse, and more than thirty Dao Ancestors were severely damaged.

And the five major forces were even more miserable, four of the five Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors fell, the thirty Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors fell eighteen, and the rest also fled with serious injuries.

Among them, the Dark Temple suffered the most losses, because the one with the most power belonged to the Dark Temple.

After this battle, the Void Sky Pulse announced a declaration of war against the Dark God Temple, the Blood Moon Sect, the Soul Devouring Sect, and the Demon Sound Sect Ruins of the Three-Eyed Tail Horn Clan, and they would not die.

In fact, except for the Dark God Temple, the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors of the other four major forces all fell, and the strength of the entire force dropped significantly.

One day a month later, the Three-Eyed Tail Horn Clan was attacked by the Void Heaven One Pulse and broke through the Dao Realm, and the Three-Eyed Tail Horn Clan was wiped out.

A year later, the Soul Eater Sect was wiped out by the Void Heaven Sect.

Three years later, the Blood Moon Sect's headquarters was destroyed, and only one Dao Ancestor escaped into the Dark Forbidden Domain, which can be regarded as annihilated.

And the Demon Yin Sect abandoned its headquarters early, and only hunted down and killed some of the True Ancestors and disciples, but did not find their Dao Ancestors.

The Dark Temple is too mysterious, the headquarters is unknown, and the Void Heaven cannot hunt down the Dao Ancestors of the Dark Temple.

But this battle has played the momentum of the Void Heaven One Pulse, and there is a vague tendency to become the fifth transcendent force.

The Void Heaven One Pulse has fallen three Dao Ancestors this time, but more True Ancestors have been promoted to Dao Ancestors, and there are also a large number of True Ancestors in the middle and late stages of the Great Dao who are constantly improving their strength and improving towards the ultimate of True Ancestors.

Once they were promoted to the True Ancestor Extreme, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor would give them the Convergence Dao Treasure to help them advance.

Quasi-Realm.

Ye Tian continued to understand the situation of the Void Heaven Realm during this time, and when he learned that the Void Heaven Realm had won a great victory, he was also much more relieved.

"146 Dao Ancestors, at this rate, you can soon surpass 200 Dao Ancestors!" Ye Tian muttered.

But he also knew very well that the number of Dao Ancestors was not at all.

The number of Dao Ancestors of any Triple Heaven Force in the Domain Realm surpassed that of the Void Heaven Lineage, not to mention the number of Dao Ancestors of those Upper Triple Heaven Forces, it was definitely a terrifying number.

Wow!

The void rippled, and the incarnation of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor came.

"Master!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Disciple, immediately launch an attack on the true kingdoms of the Dark God Temple, the Blood Moon Sect, the Soul Devouring Sect, the Demon Sound Sect, and the Three-Eyed Tail Horn Clan, resolutely destroy the five true kingdoms, and cut off their hope of rising!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said angrily.

Ye Tian knew the reason for the anger of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, although the Void Heaven One Pulse won this battle, it had lost three Dao Ancestors, one of whom was still a personal disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

That's why the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was so angry.

"Yes!"

Ye Tianying said.
